goals.title: PRD to Goal Tree Planning
goals.description: Plan from PRD into a Goal Tree and FWUs, then schedule execution
goals.success_criteria: openexec plan command parses PRD and outputs valid JSON task tree
goals.verification_method: openexec plan <intent> produces valid JSON and writes tasks.json

goals.title: Auditable FWU Execution
goals.description: Execute FWUs with an auditable loop and live status via SSE
goals.success_criteria: Execution streams events via SSE with heartbeats and audit trail
goals.verification_method: curl /events returns SSE stream; audit.db contains execution records

goals.title: Stack-Aware Quality Gates
goals.description: Enforce quality via stack-aware gates (Python/JS/Go/Rust) with structured results
goals.success_criteria: Quality gates run appropriate linters/tests per stack and produce structured JSON
goals.verification_method: openexec gates outputs JSON with pass/fail per gate type

goals.title: HITL Approval Webhooks
goals.description: Support approvals via Telegram/WhatsApp webhooks and apply decisions to execution
goals.success_criteria: Webhook endpoints accept approve/reject/pause and update execution state
goals.verification_method: POST /webhook/telegram with valid payload returns 200 and updates state

goals.title: Unified CLI Experience
goals.description: Provide a unified CLI (init/plan/start/status/tui) for all operations
goals.success_criteria: All CLI commands execute successfully with proper help text
goals.verification_method: openexec --help shows all commands; each subcommand executes

goals.title: ISO-Compliant Audit Trail
goals.description: Keep an immutable audit trail with automated evidence export for ISO compliance
goals.success_criteria: openexec export --evidence produces complete audit package
goals.verification_method: Export includes audit.db, verification evidence, model versions, gate reports

stories.title: Project Initialization & Directory Structure
stories.description: As a developer, I want openexec init to create the .openexec directory structure and initialize stores so that I have a consistent project setup
acceptance_criteria: Creates audit.db SQLite database with schema
Idempotent - running twice does not corrupt existing data

tasks.title: Define init command schema and directory structure
tasks.description: Define the directory structure, file schemas (config.yaml, tasks.json), and audit.db schema
tasks.technical_strategy: Use Go embed for schema templates. Define AuditEvent table with id, timestamp, event_type, payload JSON, signature TEXT. Use sqlite3 driver github.com/mattn/go-sqlite3.

tasks.title: Implement init command with idempotency checks
tasks.description: Create init.go implementing directory creation, SQLite initialization, and config file generation
tasks.technical_strategy: Use os.MkdirAll for directories. Check file existence before writing to ensure idempotency. Use sql.Open with ?_journal_mode=WAL for SQLite. Return explicit error if audit.db exists but schema differs.
tasks.verification_script: go test ./cmd/... -v && openexec init && openexec init

tasks.title: Add unit tests for init command
tasks.description: Write comprehensive unit tests covering happy path, idempotency, and error cases
tasks.technical_strategy: Use t.TempDir() for isolated test directories. Test: fresh init, re-init, corrupted audit.db detection. Assert file contents match expected schemas.
tasks.verification_script: go test ./cmd/... -cover -coverprofile=coverage.out && go tool cover -func=coverage.out | grep -E 'init.*[89][0-9]|100'

stories.title: Orchestration Plan CLI
stories.description: As a developer, I want openexec plan <intent> to parse a PRD/intent file and generate a JSON task tree so that I can review and execute the plan
acceptance_criteria: openexec plan <intent.md> outputs JSON summary to stdout
Validates intent file exists and is readable
stories.verification_script: openexec plan intent.md --ordering parallel && cat .openexec/tasks.json | jq '.stories | length > 0'

tasks.title: Define plan command API contract and task schema
tasks.description: Define the JSON schema for tasks.json output and plan command flags
tasks.technical_strategy: Use JSON Schema draft-07 for validation. Define Story and Task structs with json tags. Include depends_on as []string, verification_script as string.

tasks.title: Implement intent file parser
tasks.description: Parse markdown intent files extracting goals, features, and requirements
tasks.technical_strategy: Use goldmark for markdown parsing. Extract H2 sections as features, bullet points as requirements. Build dependency graph from 'depends_on' mentions.

tasks.title: Implement LLM-based story generation
tasks.description: Integrate with LLM API to generate user stories from parsed intent
tasks.technical_strategy: Use anthropic-sdk-go for Claude API. Implement retry with exponential backoff. Cache responses by intent hash to avoid re-generation. Structure prompt as system + user message.

tasks.title: Implement plan command with flags
tasks.description: Wire parser and generator into CLI command with ordering and timeout-mode flags
tasks.technical_strategy: Use cobra for CLI. Validate intent file exists before parsing. Write atomic: write to .tmp then rename. Log to audit.db on plan completion.

tasks.title: Add unit and integration tests for plan command
tasks.description: Comprehensive tests for parser, generator, and CLI integration
tasks.technical_strategy: Mock LLM responses for unit tests. Use golden files for expected output comparison. Test edge cases: empty intent, malformed markdown, missing sections.
tasks.verification_script: go test ./... -cover -coverprofile=coverage.out && go tool cover -func=coverage.out | grep plan

stories.title: Non-Bypassable Audit System
stories.description: As a compliance officer, I want all execution events to be immutably logged so that I have a complete audit trail for ISO compliance
acceptance_criteria: All execution events written to audit.db
Audit write failures halt execution immediately
Events include timestamp, event_type, payload, optional signature
Audit writes are transactional and atomic
No code path can bypass audit logging
stories.verification_script: sqlite3 .openexec/audit.db 'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM audit_events;' && go test ./internal/audit/... -v

tasks.title: Define audit event schema and error types
tasks.description: Define AuditEvent struct, database schema, and audit-specific error types
tasks.technical_strategy: Define AuditEvent with ID (ULID), Timestamp (RFC3339), EventType (enum), Payload (JSON), Signature (optional). Use custom AuditWriteError that wraps underlying error.

tasks.title: Implement audit writer with transaction support
tasks.description: Create AuditWriter that writes events atomically and halts on failure
tasks.technical_strategy: Use sql.Tx for atomic writes. Implement Write() that returns error on any failure. Use sync.Mutex for thread safety. Panic recovery should still attempt audit write.

tasks.title: Implement optional cryptographic signing
tasks.description: Add optional ed25519 signature to audit events for tamper detection
tasks.technical_strategy: Use crypto/ed25519 for signing. Key stored in .openexec/audit.key (generate on init if missing). Sign concatenation of timestamp + event_type + payload hash.

tasks.title: Add comprehensive audit system tests
tasks.description: Unit tests for all audit paths including failure scenarios
tasks.technical_strategy: Test: successful write, DB locked error halts, concurrent writes, signature verification. Use sqlmock for failure injection.
tasks.verification_script: go test ./internal/audit/... -cover -coverprofile=audit_coverage.out && go tool cover -func=audit_coverage.out | grep -E '[9][0-9]|100'

stories.title: Execution Engine with SSE
stories.description: As a developer, I want execution to stream events via SSE so that I can monitor progress in real-time
acceptance_criteria: Iteration and phase events streamed in real-time

tasks.title: Define SSE event types and payload schemas
tasks.description: Define event types (heartbeat, iteration, phase, error) and their JSON payloads
tasks.technical_strategy: Define EventType enum. Heartbeat: {timestamp}. Iteration: {task_id, iteration, status}. Phase: {task_id, phase, progress}. Use json.Marshal for payloads.

tasks.title: Implement SSE broker with fan-out
tasks.description: Create SSE broker that manages client connections and broadcasts events
tasks.technical_strategy: Use channels for client registration. Broker goroutine selects on register/unregister/broadcast channels. Use context.Context for client lifecycle. Buffer 10 events per client.

tasks.title: Implement /events HTTP handler
tasks.description: Create HTTP handler that upgrades to SSE and subscribes to broker
tasks.technical_strategy: Set Content-Type: text/event-stream. Set Cache-Control: no-cache. Use http.Flusher for immediate writes. Handle client disconnect via request context cancellation.

tasks.title: Implement heartbeat generator
tasks.description: Background goroutine that sends heartbeat events every 30 seconds
tasks.technical_strategy: Use time.Ticker for 30s interval. Heartbeat includes server timestamp in RFC3339. Ticker stopped on context cancellation.

tasks.title: Add SSE integration tests
tasks.description: End-to-end tests for SSE streaming with multiple clients
tasks.technical_strategy: Use httptest.Server for integration tests. Test: single client receives events, multiple clients fan-out, client disconnect cleanup, heartbeat timing.

stories.title: Execution Start Command
stories.description: As a developer, I want openexec start to launch execution with configurable harness, provider, and model so that I can run tasks with different configurations
acceptance_criteria: openexec start launches execution from tasks.json

tasks.title: Define start command flags and configuration
tasks.description: Define CLI flags and map to execution configuration struct
tasks.technical_strategy: Use cobra flags: --harness (string, default 'local'), --provider (string, required), --model (string, required). Validate provider against known list.

tasks.title: Implement execution loop with task scheduling
tasks.description: Create execution loop that processes tasks respecting dependencies
tasks.technical_strategy: Build DAG from depends_on. Use topological sort for ordering. Execute ready tasks (all deps complete). Use worker pool with configurable concurrency. Integrate audit writer.

tasks.title: Implement harness abstraction (local/docker)
tasks.description: Create harness interface with local and docker implementations
tasks.technical_strategy: Define Harness interface: Execute(cmd string) (output, error). LocalHarness uses os/exec. DockerHarness uses docker exec. Both capture stdout/stderr.

tasks.title: Implement provider abstraction (anthropic/openai/ollama)
tasks.description: Create provider interface with implementations for each LLM provider
tasks.technical_strategy: Define Provider interface: Generate(prompt string) (response, error). Use official SDKs where available. Implement retry with exponential backoff. Log all API calls to audit.

tasks.title: Wire start command with SSE output
tasks.description: Connect execution loop to SSE broker and terminal output
tasks.technical_strategy: Execution loop publishes events to broker. Start command subscribes and prints to terminal. Use color output for different event types. Handle SIGINT for graceful shutdown.

tasks.title: Add unit and integration tests for start command
tasks.description: Comprehensive tests for execution loop, harnesses, and providers
tasks.technical_strategy: Mock providers for unit tests. Use testcontainers-go for Docker harness integration tests. Test: successful run, dependency ordering, failure handling.

stories.title: Stack-Aware Quality Gates
stories.description: As a developer, I want quality gates that automatically detect and run appropriate checks for Python/JS/Go/Rust projects so that code quality is enforced consistently
acceptance_criteria: Auto-detects project stack from files (pyproject.toml, package.json, go.mod, Cargo.toml)
stories.verification_script: openexec gates --output json | jq '.gates[] | select(.passed == true)'

tasks.title: Define quality gate schema and stack detection
tasks.description: Define gate types, result schema, and stack detection logic
tasks.technical_strategy: Define GateResult struct: Name, Stack, Passed, Output, Duration. Detect stack by checking for marker files in order: pyproject.toml->Python, package.json->JS, go.mod->Go, Cargo.toml->Rust.

tasks.title: Implement Python quality gates
tasks.description: Implement linting (ruff/flake8), formatting (black), type checking (mypy), and testing (pytest)
tasks.technical_strategy: Run ruff check . for linting. Run black --check . for format. Run mypy . for types. Run pytest --cov for tests. Parse exit codes for pass/fail.

tasks.title: Implement JavaScript/TypeScript quality gates
tasks.description: Implement linting (eslint), formatting (prettier), type checking (tsc), and testing (jest/vitest)
tasks.technical_strategy: Detect package manager from lockfile. Run npx eslint . for lint. Run npx prettier --check . for format. Run npx tsc --noEmit for types. Run npm test for tests.

tasks.title: Implement Go quality gates
tasks.description: Implement linting (golangci-lint), formatting (gofmt), and testing (go test)
tasks.technical_strategy: Run golangci-lint run for lint. Run gofmt -l . for format check. Run go test -cover ./... for tests. Parse coverage percentage from output.

tasks.title: Implement Rust quality gates
tasks.description: Implement linting (clippy), formatting (rustfmt), and testing (cargo test)
tasks.technical_strategy: Run cargo clippy -- -D warnings for lint. Run cargo fmt --check for format. Run cargo test for tests. Run cargo tarpaulin for coverage if available.

tasks.title: Implement gates CLI command with JSON output
tasks.description: Wire gate runners into CLI with structured JSON output
tasks.technical_strategy: Use cobra for CLI. --output flag: json/text (default text). --stack flag to override detection. Run gates in parallel per stack. Aggregate results.

tasks.title: Add comprehensive gate tests
tasks.description: Unit and integration tests for all gate types
tasks.technical_strategy: Use golden files for expected output. Test each stack with passing and failing code samples. Test monorepo detection with multiple stacks.

stories.title: Status Command with SSE Subscription
stories.description: As a developer, I want openexec status to subscribe to execution events and display concise status so that I can monitor running executions
acceptance_criteria: openexec status connects to running execution
Displays current task, phase, and progress

tasks.title: Define status display format and update logic
tasks.description: Define terminal output format for status updates
tasks.technical_strategy: Use ANSI escape codes for in-place updates. Show: [Task X/Y] task_id - phase (progress%). Use color: green=complete, yellow=running, red=failed.

tasks.title: Implement SSE client for status subscription
tasks.description: Create SSE client that connects to /events and parses events
tasks.technical_strategy: Use bufio.Scanner for SSE parsing. Handle event: and data: lines. Reconnect on connection drop with backoff. Use context for cancellation.

tasks.title: Wire status command with terminal output
tasks.description: Connect SSE client to terminal renderer
tasks.technical_strategy: Subscribe to SSE on command start. Update terminal on each event. Show summary table on completion. Support --follow flag to continue after completion.

tasks.title: Add status command tests
tasks.description: Unit and integration tests for status command
tasks.technical_strategy: Mock SSE server for unit tests. Test: connection, event parsing, display updates, reconnection, timeout handling.

stories.title: Telegram Webhook Integration
stories.description: As an approver, I want to receive approval requests via Telegram and respond with approve/reject/pause so that I can control execution remotely

tasks.title: Define Telegram webhook schema and validation
tasks.description: Define Telegram Update struct and secret token validation
tasks.technical_strategy: Parse Telegram Update JSON. Validate X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token header. Return 401 on invalid token. Define command patterns: /approve, /reject, /pause.

tasks.title: Implement Telegram command parser
tasks.description: Parse incoming messages for approval commands
tasks.technical_strategy: Extract text from message.text. Parse /approve <task_id>, /reject <task_id> <reason>, /pause. Validate task_id exists in current execution.

tasks.title: Implement execution state updates from webhook
tasks.description: Connect webhook to execution state machine
tasks.technical_strategy: Approve: mark task approved, continue execution. Reject: mark task rejected, halt or skip based on config. Pause: set execution to paused state. All actions logged to audit.

tasks.title: Implement Telegram reply sender
tasks.description: Send confirmation messages back to Telegram user
tasks.technical_strategy: Use Telegram Bot API sendMessage. Include task_id and action in reply. Use chat_id from incoming message. Handle API errors gracefully.

tasks.title: Add Telegram webhook integration tests
tasks.description: End-to-end tests for Telegram webhook flow
tasks.technical_strategy: Mock Telegram API for replies. Test: valid token, invalid token rejection, command parsing, state updates, audit logging.

stories.title: WhatsApp Webhook Integration
stories.description: As an approver, I want to receive approval requests via WhatsApp and respond with approve/reject/pause so that I can use my preferred messaging platform

tasks.title: Define WhatsApp/Twilio webhook schema and validation
tasks.description: Define Twilio webhook parameters and signature validation
tasks.technical_strategy: Parse form-encoded body: Body, From, To, MessageSid. Validate X-Twilio-Signature using HMAC-SHA1. Return 403 on invalid signature.

tasks.title: Implement WhatsApp message parser
tasks.description: Parse incoming messages for approval commands
tasks.technical_strategy: Extract Body field. Parse case-insensitive: 'approve', 'reject', 'pause'. Support natural language: 'yes'=approve, 'no'=reject. Extract task_id if provided.

tasks.title: Implement TwiML response generator
tasks.description: Generate TwiML responses for WhatsApp replies
tasks.technical_strategy: Use encoding/xml for TwiML. Generate <Response><Message>text</Message></Response>. Include action confirmation and task status.

tasks.title: Wire WhatsApp webhook to execution state
tasks.description: Connect webhook handler to execution state machine
tasks.technical_strategy: Reuse state update logic from Telegram. Map From number to authorized approvers config. Log all actions to audit with Twilio MessageSid.

tasks.title: Add WhatsApp webhook integration tests
tasks.description: End-to-end tests for WhatsApp webhook flow
tasks.technical_strategy: Generate valid Twilio signatures for tests. Test: signature validation, message parsing, state updates, TwiML response format.

stories.title: Live TUI Dashboard
stories.description: As a developer, I want openexec tui to show a real-time terminal dashboard of workers, tasks, and logs so that I can monitor complex executions visually
acceptance_criteria: Shows worker status panel with active/idle counts
Shows live log stream from execution

tasks.title: Set up Bubbletea TUI framework
tasks.description: Initialize Bubbletea application structure and layout
tasks.technical_strategy: Use github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea. Define Model with panels: workers, tasks, logs. Use lipgloss for styling. Set up Init, Update, View functions.

tasks.title: Implement worker status panel
tasks.description: Create panel showing worker states and counts
tasks.technical_strategy: Display table: Worker ID, Status, Current Task, Duration. Use bubbles/table for rendering. Update on worker events from SSE. Color code: green=active, gray=idle.

tasks.title: Implement task queue panel
tasks.description: Create panel showing task states with progress
tasks.technical_strategy: Display: Task ID, Title, Status, Progress%. Use bubbles/progress for bars. Sort: running first, then pending, then completed. Truncate long titles.

tasks.title: Implement live log panel
tasks.description: Create scrollable panel showing execution logs
tasks.technical_strategy: Use bubbles/viewport for scrolling. Auto-scroll to bottom on new logs. Support page up/down. Syntax highlight log levels. Limit buffer to 1000 lines.

tasks.title: Wire SSE events to TUI updates
tasks.description: Connect SSE client to TUI model updates
tasks.technical_strategy: Run SSE client in goroutine. Send Bubbletea messages via program.Send(). Handle all event types. Show connection status in footer.

tasks.title: Implement keyboard navigation
tasks.description: Add keyboard shortcuts for panel switching and actions
tasks.technical_strategy: Tab: cycle panels. Arrow keys: navigate within panel. q: quit. r: reconnect SSE. h: show help. Use bubbles/key for bindings.

tasks.title: Add TUI command and tests
tasks.description: Wire TUI to CLI command with comprehensive tests
tasks.technical_strategy: Use tea.WithAltScreen for full terminal. Handle terminal resize. Test with teatest for TUI testing. Mock SSE for deterministic tests.

stories.title: ISO Evidence Export
stories.description: As a compliance officer, I want openexec export --evidence to generate a complete audit package so that I can provide evidence for ISO audits
acceptance_criteria: Includes all verification evidence (test results, gate reports)
Includes model versions used in execution
Archive is named with timestamp and run-id

tasks.title: Define evidence package structure
tasks.description: Define directory structure and manifest format for evidence archive
tasks.technical_strategy: Structure: /audit.db, /evidence/*.json, /gates/*.json, /manifest.json. Manifest includes: run_id, timestamp, file checksums, model versions.

tasks.title: Implement evidence collector
tasks.description: Collect all evidence files from execution run
tasks.technical_strategy: Query audit.db for run events. Collect gate outputs from .openexec/gates/. Collect test outputs from .openexec/evidence/. Calculate SHA256 for each file.

tasks.title: Implement manifest generator
tasks.description: Generate manifest.json with checksums and metadata
tasks.technical_strategy: Include: schema_version, run_id, start_time, end_time, model_versions map, file_checksums map. Sign manifest if signing key available.

tasks.title: Implement zip archive creator
tasks.description: Create compressed archive with all evidence
tasks.technical_strategy: Use archive/zip. Name: evidence-{run_id}-{timestamp}.zip. Preserve directory structure. Use compression level 6 for balance.

tasks.title: Wire export command to CLI
tasks.description: Add export command with --evidence flag
tasks.technical_strategy: Use cobra. --evidence flag triggers full export. --run-id to specify which run (default: latest). --output to specify destination. Log export action to audit.

tasks.title: Add export command tests
tasks.description: Unit and integration tests for export functionality
tasks.technical_strategy: Test: file collection, manifest generation, archive creation, archive extraction verification. Use golden files for manifest format.

stories.title: Story-Level Validation Review
stories.description: As a reviewer, I want automatic validation when all tasks in a story complete so that I can approve integrated features rather than individual tasks
acceptance_criteria: Validation triggered automatically when all story tasks complete
Runs quality gates on entire story scope
Sends notification to reviewer for approval
Records validation result in audit trail

tasks.title: Define validation trigger and report schema
tasks.description: Define when validation triggers and what the report contains
tasks.technical_strategy: Trigger on story.tasks.all(t => t.status == 'verified'). Report: story_id, validation_time, gate_results[], overall_status, reviewer_id (null until approved).

tasks.title: Implement story completion detector
tasks.description: Monitor task completions and detect story completion
tasks.technical_strategy: Subscribe to task completion events. Maintain story->tasks map. Check all tasks verified on each completion. Emit story_ready_for_validation event.

tasks.title: Implement story-level gate runner
tasks.description: Run quality gates scoped to story files
tasks.technical_strategy: Collect all files modified by story tasks. Run gates only on those files. Aggregate results. Support --story flag in gates command.

tasks.title: Implement validation report generator
tasks.description: Generate structured validation report
tasks.technical_strategy: Include: story metadata, all task verifications, gate results, acceptance criteria checklist. Output as JSON and markdown. Store in .openexec/validations/.

tasks.title: Integrate validation with notification system
tasks.description: Send validation notifications to reviewers
tasks.technical_strategy: Send via configured channel (Telegram/WhatsApp). Include story title, validation summary, approve/reject buttons. Support multiple reviewers.

tasks.title: Add validation integration tests
tasks.description: End-to-end tests for validation flow
tasks.technical_strategy: Test: completion detection, gate execution, report generation, notification sending, audit logging. Mock external services.

stories.title: Web Dashboard with SSE
stories.description: As a stakeholder, I want a web dashboard showing projects, phases, workers, and audit events so that I can monitor executions from a browser
acceptance_criteria: Next.js dashboard accessible on configured port
Shows list of projects with status
Updates via SSE without page refresh
stories.verification_script: cd web && npm run build && npm run start -- --port 3000 & sleep 5 && curl -f http://localhost:3000

tasks.title: Initialize Next.js project with TypeScript
tasks.description: Set up Next.js project structure with TypeScript and Tailwind
tasks.technical_strategy: Use create-next-app with TypeScript template. Add Tailwind CSS. Configure .env.local for BACKEND_URL. Add src/ directory structure.

tasks.title: Implement SSE client hook
tasks.description: Create React hook for SSE subscription
tasks.technical_strategy: Use EventSource API. Handle reconnection with exponential backoff. Parse event types. Return typed event stream. Clean up on unmount.

tasks.title: Implement project list component
tasks.description: Create component showing all projects with status
tasks.technical_strategy: Fetch projects from /api/projects. Show: name, status badge, last activity. Use shadcn/ui for components. Support click to view details.

tasks.title: Implement execution phases component
tasks.description: Create component showing execution phases with progress
tasks.technical_strategy: Subscribe to phase events via SSE. Show phase name, status, progress bar. Animate transitions. Highlight current phase.

tasks.title: Implement worker status component
tasks.description: Create component showing worker states
tasks.technical_strategy: Subscribe to worker events via SSE. Show worker grid with status indicators. Update in real-time. Show current task on hover.

tasks.title: Implement audit event feed component
tasks.description: Create component showing recent audit events
tasks.technical_strategy: Subscribe to audit events via SSE. Show scrollable list. Format: timestamp, event type, summary. Color by severity. Click to expand details.

tasks.title: Create main dashboard layout
tasks.description: Assemble components into responsive dashboard layout
tasks.technical_strategy: Use CSS Grid for layout. Responsive breakpoints. Projects sidebar, main content with phases/workers, audit feed footer. Dark mode support.

tasks.title: Add E2E tests for dashboard
tasks.description: End-to-end tests for dashboard functionality
tasks.technical_strategy: Use Playwright. Test: page load, SSE connection, real-time updates, responsive layout. Mock backend SSE for deterministic tests.

stories.title: Goal Validation E2E Tests
stories.description: As a project owner, I want automated E2E tests that verify all primary goals are achieved so that I have confidence in the system
acceptance_criteria: E2E test suite covers all 6 primary goals
Tests run against fully deployed system
Test results included in evidence export

tasks.title: Set up Playwright E2E test infrastructure
tasks.description: Configure Playwright for goal validation tests
tasks.technical_strategy: Use @playwright/test. Configure for multiple browsers. Set up test fixtures for backend and frontend. Configure CI reporters.
tasks.verification_script: npx playwright install && npx playwright test --list

tasks.title: Implement G-001 test: PRD to Goal Tree
tasks.description: E2E test for planning flow
tasks.technical_strategy: Test: openexec plan with sample intent produces valid tasks.json. Verify JSON schema. Verify goal linkage. Verify dependency graph.

tasks.title: Implement G-002 test: Auditable Execution
tasks.description: E2E test for execution with SSE and audit
tasks.technical_strategy: Test: start execution, subscribe to SSE, verify events received, verify audit.db populated. Use simple mock task for fast execution.

tasks.title: Implement G-003 test: Quality Gates
tasks.description: E2E test for stack-aware quality gates
tasks.technical_strategy: Test: run gates on Python project, verify lint/test/type results. Test Go project detection. Verify structured JSON output.

tasks.title: Implement G-004 test: HITL Webhooks
tasks.description: E2E test for approval webhooks
tasks.technical_strategy: Test: POST to Telegram webhook with approve command. Verify state change. Verify audit log. Test reject and pause.

tasks.title: Implement G-005 test: Unified CLI
tasks.description: E2E test for all CLI commands
tasks.technical_strategy: Test: init, plan, start, status, tui --help. Verify exit codes. Verify output format. Test error cases.

tasks.title: Implement G-006 test: ISO Compliance
tasks.description: E2E test for evidence export
tasks.technical_strategy: Test: run execution, export evidence, verify archive contents. Verify manifest checksums. Verify all required files present.

tasks.title: Configure CI integration for goal tests
tasks.description: Set up CI pipeline to run goal validation tests
tasks.technical_strategy: Add GitHub Actions workflow. Run on PR and main. Fail pipeline on test failure. Upload test results as artifacts.
